case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS FUNG, HING

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUNG, HING $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
